description: Pins the non-positive alert_id rejection both languages share (service_type valid first) and the get GET. Missing/non-integer alert_id text diverges (Go 'alert_id is required'/'positive integer' vs Python 'alert_id must be a valid integer'); service_type rejection also diverges (see report).

cases.name: rejects non-positive alert_id
cases.expect_error: alert_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: gets the monitor service alert definition
